description: Inventory of secrets synced from OpenBao/Vault to Windows user-level environment variables by Sync-Secrets.ps1. NAMES AND VAULT PATHS ONLY — values live in the vault, never in this file.

fieldDocs.path: Full kv-v2 path with the mount as the first segment (e.g. secret/infrastructure/cloudflare -> mount 'secret', secret path 'infrastructure/cloudflare').
fieldDocs.key: The key inside the kv entry that holds the value.
fieldDocs.description: What the secret is for and which script/doc consumes it.
fieldDocs.verify: true means the path/key has not been confirmed against the live vault yet; Sync-Secrets warns but still attempts the entry. Remove the flag once confirmed.

CLOUDFLARE_API_TOKEN.description: Cloudflare API token. Path carried over from the pre-migration vault layout (see docs/openbao-cutover.md).

OPENROUTER_API_KEY.description: OpenRouter API key for LLM tooling.

SNYK_TOKEN.description: Snyk API token consumed by scripts/Invoke-SnykScan.ps1 (see docs/snyk.md).
